channel.title: java on Sebastian Hoß
channel.description: Recent content in java on Sebastian Hoß

item.title: Use a specific Java version with GitHub Actions
item.description: The setup-java action allows to use a specific Java version in your GitHub Action. name:<PIPELINE>jobs:build:runs-on:<RUN_ON>steps:- name:Set up JDK <JDK_VERSION>uses:actions/setup-java@v1with:java-version:<JDK_VERSION> <PIPELINE>: The name of your pipeline. <RUN_ON>: The runner to use, see GitHub’s own documentation for possible values. <JDK_VERSION>: The required Java version for your project.
